description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

RECRUITMENT CLOSED due to organizer circumstances.

This tour heads toward Bonomine Peak, learning stream-walking basics and enjoying gorge walking on the beautiful Shirataizawa route with its dramatic gorge formations. Lunch and dinner feature game meat restaurant bento boxes and a full dinner, with educational information about game meat cuisine.

【Fee】 ¥23,000 per person (includes guide fee, meals, insurance)

【Capacity】 5 people

【Guide】 Tsuyoshi Shinohara (Japan Mountain Guides Association, mountaineering guide stage III)

【What to bring】 20-liter backpack (waterproofed), full stream-walking gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountain climbing equipment, bus fare, bath fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: ⛰️ RECRUITMENT CLOSED. Stream-walking tour of Bonomine Peak and Shirataizawa Gorge, learning basics while enjoying game meat dinner.
